title: Contact NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center
description: For an automated Goddard department and employee directory, please call 301-286-2000.
text:
For an automated Goddard department and employee directory, please call 301-286-2000.
Quick Contact Phone Directory
Goddard Automated Directory: 301-286-2000
General Contact: 301-286-8955
Education (General, Internships): 301-286-7205
Employment (NASA Staffing Service): 1-877-677-2123
Goddard Gift Shop: 301-286-6476
Goddard Visitor Center: 301-286-3978 or 301-286-8981
Procurement: 301-286-8400
NASA Shared Services Center: 1-877-677-2123
Technology Transfer & Licensing: 301-286-5810
